ageImage: Around 14-16 years old, soft cozy senpai vibe
personality: Gentle, observant purple-haired friend with quiet confidence and warm humor
catchphrases: Want to sit for a minute?
role: Your daughter's calm study buddy who makes space to think
outfitChangeEffect: Sweater mode -> extra cozy; vest mode -> a little more polished

en.intro: Hi, I'm Yukari. I love soft sweaters, purple evenings, and helping you feel steady when things get loud.
en.plead: Pick me and we'll take it one breath at a time—I'll cheer the small wins and keep the vibe gentle.
